title: The Narrow Tunnel
lines: The tunnel is an impossibly narrow throat of petrified wood, pressing against your ribs with a cold, absolute weight that defies the laws of physical space. The air is frigid and carries the cloying scent of desiccated bone and ancient, sun-scorched sand from a world you do not recognize.

As you crawl, the walls—textured like petrified, fibrous flesh—seem to contract and expand with a slow, tectonic pulse that vibrates in your skull. You are deep within the anatomy of something vast, ancient, and uncaring. There is no retreat; the amethyst glow ahead is your only path.

options.desc: 1. Continue crawling forward into the pulsing dark
2. Succumb to panic and try to force your way through faster
3. Feel along the jagged, pulsing wooden walls
